payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Wall-mounted light-colored rectangular picture frame with a white mat surrounding a small square beach/umbrella print; frame is partially occluded by a diagonal wooden staircase banister and appears small-to-medium in size, roughly 2.5 meters from the camera.
